text: ss ma order stts delivered batave chhe pn packet malyo nathi
aa screenshot ma refund initiated lakhyu chhe pn paisa account ma nathi aavya
invoice pic ma gst no half cut thay gyo chhe tame full copy moklo
tracking page ni pic ma expected date aj batave chhe pn koi call nathi
kyc screen shot ma surname blur dekhae chhe pn original clear htu
payment ss ma success aavyu chhe pn order list ma blank line dekhay chhe
error pic ma address line 2 gayab chhe etle parcel return thayu hoy lage chhe
exchange form ni pic ma size field wrong capture thay chhe
wallet history ss ma same txn be var dekhae chhe
pickup slot ni screen ma savare ni jagyae random code aave chhe
order summary pic ma discount line cut thayeli chhe etle total samajhatu nathi
support chat export ss ma maro pehlo msg half j dekhay chhe
product label ni photo mathi color black ni jagyae blk j read thay chhe
bank proof pic ma account no last 4 digit ulta read thay chhe
delivery proof ss ma building name ni niche no text missing chhe
return qr ni pic ma code vachche space avi gaya chhe scan nathi thatu
refund policy screenshot ma 7 days ni jagyae 1 days jevu read thay chhe
app error ss ma retry later line adhi cut chhe
promo screen ni pic ma minimum amount no zero gayab chhe
shipment label photo ma house no 12 ni jagyae l2 read thay chhe
kyc upload ss ma front side done batave chhe pn back side pending rahyu
call back request screen shot ma time window 10-12 ni jagyae 10 2 read thay chhe
invoice ss ma item qty be chhe pn total ma ek j count thay chhe
replacement screenshot ma pickup free ni line niche thi cut chhe
delivery map ss ma gate pin wrong side batave chhe
wallet screenshot ma cashback credited lakhyu chhe pn balance same chhe
chat pic ma agent e je number moklyo e no last digit clear nathi
return form ss ma reason damaged ni jagyae damagd read thay chhe
profile screen shot ma city field ahmedabad ni jagyae ahmedbad read thay chhe
delivery update pic ma out for delvry lakhyu chhe etle status exact samajhatu nathi
ss me order stts delivered dikh raha hai par packet mila nahi
refund screenshot me initiated likha hai par paise account me nahi aaye
invoice pic me gst no aadha cut gaya hai full copy bhejiye
tracking screenshot me expected date aaj dikh rahi hai par call nahi aaya
kyc screenshot me surname blur dikh raha hai par original clear tha
payment ss me success aaya hai par order list me blank line aa rahi hai
error pic me address line 2 gayab hai isliye parcel return hua lag raha hai
exchange form screenshot me size field galat capture ho rahi hai
wallet history ss me same txn do baar dikh raha hai
pickup slot screen me subah ki jagah random code aa raha hai
order summary pic me discount line cut gayi hai isliye total samajh nahi aa raha
support chat export ss me mera pehla msg aadha hi dikh raha hai
product label photo me color black ki jagah blk read ho raha hai
bank proof pic me account no ke last 4 digit ulte read ho rahe hain
delivery proof screenshot me building name ke niche ka text missing hai
return qr pic me code ke beech me space aa gaye hain scan nahi ho raha
refund policy screenshot me 7 days ki jagah 1 days jaisa read ho raha hai
app error ss me retry later wali line aadhi cut gayi hai
promo screen pic me minimum amount ka zero missing hai
shipment label photo me house no 12 ki jagah l2 read ho raha hai
kyc upload screenshot me front side done dikh raha hai par back side pending hai
callback request ss me time window 10-12 ki jagah 10 2 read ho raha hai
invoice screenshot me item qty do hai par total me ek hi count ho raha hai
replacement screenshot me pickup free wali line niche se cut hai
delivery map ss me gate pin galat side dikh raha hai
wallet screenshot me cashback credited likha hai par balance same hai
chat pic me agent ne jo number bheja tha uska last digit clear nahi hai
return form ss me reason damaged ki jagah damagd read ho raha hai
profile screenshot me city field ahmedabad ki jagah ahmedbad read ho raha hai
delivery update pic me out for delvry likha hai isliye status exact samajh nahi aa raha
